name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Now Hiring!
body:
Have you been looking for an opportunity to help your Indiana Republican Party and make a difference in the lives of Hoosiers... |
---
| |
---
|
---
| **Join Our Team!**
---
| Are you looking for an opportunity to help your Indiana Republican Party and make a difference in the lives of Hoosiers? Then look no further! We are looking for enthusiastic and motivated Republicans to join our grassroots team as field organizers and political interns!

Field Organizers play a critical role in the Indiana Republican Party and the Eric Holcomb for Indiana field efforts, working to build the grassroots infrastructure for Republican success up and down the ballot in 2020. Field organizers recruit, train, and manage local neighborhood teams – leading the on-the-ground voter contact effort for their community. **_Field Organizer Job Description:_**
* Gain first-hand experience in implementing a grassroots plan within your community
* Build infrastructure, recruit, train and manage local teams
* Preferred campaign experience, but not required
* May need to travel

Our political interns are also making a big difference – and gaining experience by getting an inside view of what it takes to run a statewide campaign.

**_Political Intern Job Description:_**
* Gain first-hand experience in implementing a grassroots plan including phone banks and door to door activites
* Manage candidate and campaign information
* Research for various projects
* May need to travel

**To apply, please submit your resume to[info@indiana.gop](mailto:info@indiana.gop), and we'll be in touch.**

To continue keeping Indiana on the right track we'll need the help of hardworking team members across the state. We'd love to have you join our team and help us continue delivering results for all Hoosiers!

Thanks,
-Your Indiana Republican Party

---
|
---
| |
---

name: Mary Ellen Smith, Team Hick
subject: Are you surprised?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello, In just two days, we'll close the books on February fundraising and evaluate whether or not we're on track for our first financial quarter in this all-important election year. Right now, we're coming up short. This might surprise you, but donations to emails just like this one make up a huge part of our projections. Because John (proudly) refuses to accept donations from corporate PACs, we're relying on grassroots folks like you to come through with $5 here or $10 there to help make up the difference. Republicans and their billionaire buddies are throwing everything they've got at us (they have nearly $200 million cash on hand to pull from!). So, I'm not exaggerating when I say that we are _literally_ depending on your support to keep us going another day. **With that in mind, can we count on you to add a donation of whatever you can afford before our critical end-of-month deadline on Saturday to help us flip Colorado 's Senate seat blue?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200227-me?refcode=em-200227-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Team Bloomberg 2020
subject: How to save the planet in four minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
This is how we get big things done on climate change.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=e7416d327f51416fae19bbb941ff8491&_e=P5PJtaesX8e-yKRaYb8bPvpst2-CbcjgxwigpEVY0U91j5KvKS--KoX8lJHUCN4OyYmU5tTfYsW77yRoMrT5ud_QfeS5hcrCJbNYfybz60H_ISeR0LTAHlYfS4eHZfHrL9Tk7fnvZYLxQKrB93xENP6H_hbJq6sSQfXYPZt9tPzK1hSHuRQ7uTcSI5Zv25rhZNzh1horgUwxiXGdFDPwI08HtuPp3nX3D4Z5vxWHFrMyWUubqVb24dVscBDKV8EP8g-6yz1VFYqOZLbZ33JLG4bb0OzdQQD3mF-s8v_1Jl3L8K7g_4TllsZhYbnm56Yf9oHU4TVSRqgovtNr_G6jf_HPUR3pc0Ls9fy5gfPWzF8BlZLBYdPUOoPvtp-ztHqbklCLZIjOAycLEbp2waek65tvv0E9WqWr74pPi-cAz9k%3D) Climate change is the biggest threat to America and the world. Full stop. You know that no other Democrat in this election can match Mike's record of getting big things done on climate change. But do you know how he's going to get big things done as president? [**We just released a new video that breaks down the problem -- and shows how Mike will bring Americans together to solve it. Can you watch and share today?**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=e7416d327f51416fae19bbb941ff8491&_e=P5PJtaesX8e-yKRaYb8bPvpst2-CbcjgxwigpEVY0U91j5KvKS--KoX8lJHUCN4OyYmU5tTfYsW77yRoMrT5ud_QfeS5hcrCJbNYfybz60H_ISeR0LTAHlYfS4eHZfHrL9Tk7fnvZYLxQKrB93xENP6H_hbJq6sSQfXYPZt9tPzK1hSHuRQ7uTcSI5Zv25rhm-8e-IEOzck-CMu4kpeUrj6sAUUWaBIhU-6N_ZIz0Z3fzBHOlbYKxg0orouh0abVTqp7yDVMcUWfKNN8ZL4iMm30g4qLf9CCjTK9efaLMbKQ9gDDWLj8_hpm1FEA2UQdIXboioxx4tH--MtxYbXp47YRSG_FEeRcctPoMzw_C9UbeOO_0AhU9hSMDnkNy9vsHTeOWyB6JnSt9GodvrZim7QASNZinEDDklYeH2i6Irw%3D) [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=e7416d327f51416fae19bbb941ff8491&_e=P5PJtaesX8e-yKRaYb8bPvpst2-CbcjgxwigpEVY0U91j5KvKS--KoX8lJHUCN4OyYmU5tTfYsW77yRoMrT5ud_QfeS5hcrCJbNYfybz60H_ISeR0LTAHlYfS4eHZfHrL9Tk7fnvZYLxQKrB93xENP6H_hbJq6sSQfXYPZt9tPzK1hSHuRQ7uTcSI5Zv25rhk7I3KszRvsVEcKP29DrLrHHgeYrrA-G2F0j2MaSpMtyIhjSz0PirRjDb1rQwjRSpzU3WNJzj9rfJWidSW2jvqO13ZJBFr-TzasCCAIGkvto6o77UDrJCHsVFoybyO-dCuvpygXFLYMw9ndAqmj4U5hL72gRPtrSOy-MEx56hvmPUglcOeisMKOmyhC6jDRgBe2GC90aO8m1VF8ZfP2dt3-lFZ6hkqD_8Hy0w1u9CSAo%3D) Mike has an aggressive and achievable plan to replace dirty energy with 100% clean energy, power our transportation and buildings without harmful emissions, and help communities that are the most harmed by pollution and climate change. **Want to know how Mike's going to get it done? clean_body: This is how we get big things done on climate change. | Climate change is the biggest threat to America and the world. Full stop. You know that no other Democrat in this election can match Mike's record of getting big things done on climate change. But do you know how he's going to get big things done as president? Mike has an aggressive and achievable plan to replace dirty energy with 100% clean energy, power our transportation and buildings without harmful emissions, and help communities that are the most harmed by pollution and climate change. Want to know how Mike's going to get it done? Watch the video -- then share it with the people you know: Thanks, Team Bloomberg 2020 | | | ---|---|--- . This moment calls on us to fight hard and hold strong in Minnesota. From the White House to the Senate to the House, just about everything rides on how Democrats like myself fare in November.

With Trump, Pence, and their Republican allies doing everything they can to defeat us and flip Minnesota red, there has never been a more important time to get involved in our campaign.

If each of us steps up right now, I'm confident we will show to everyone -- from the pundits to our Republican opponent -- that we have what it takes to win re-election, flip the Senate, and defeat Donald Trump. Can I count on you?

**Contribute ahead of the end-of-month deadline in just two days if you are ready to stand up and take back power in Washington. I won't be able to do this without you.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: MJ Hegar for Texas
subject: 5 days left -- what's holding you back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890514/7f51f7bc/4df53155/4ef1933d/4118836056/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **$4,124 LEFT TO OUR END-OF-MONTH GOAL
EVERY DONATION MATCHED
[DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT NOW >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890514/7f51f7bc/4df53155/4ef1933c/4118836056/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200227.3nd__982__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
Peter -- With five days left until Primary Day, we have one question -- **what 's holding you back?** We're counting on your help to get MJ elected in November, but first we have to make sure MJ gets through this primary in the strongest position possible to defeat Sen. Cornyn. **There are two options -- which will you choose?**
> **Option 1:[Make your first* donation to this campaign today:](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890514/7f51f7bc/4df53155/4ef1933c/4118836056/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200227.3nd__982__&amount=10&recurring=true") **
> If you choose this option, we'll be able to reach undecided voters across Texas and make sure they know all about MJ and make a plan to vote for her in this primary. MJ will enter the next phase of this campaign with this powerful grassroots team alongside her, and be well-positioned to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November.
>
> **Option 2: You decide not to donate, hoping that others will step up.**
> You assume that other people will step up, but everyone else assumes the same thing, and we start missing important fundraising goals and losing the momentum we've worked so hard to build. _Senator Cornyn wins reelection and spends another six years working against regular Texans._
**[**Make the right choice: Donate now >>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890514/7f51f7bc/4df53155/4ef1933c/4118836056/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200227.3nd__982__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
Look, Peter -- _none of us_ wants to wake up the day after the election knowing we could have done more to defeat Sen. Cornyn and his special interest backers. But we're running out of time! That's why we're emailing you today.

**There 's only ONE more day of early voting and FIVE days until the primary -- but LOTS of undecided voters left. EVERY DOLLAR YOU GIVE WILL BE MATCHED, so now is the most effective time to donate before the primary!**

MJ is relying on you. She doesn't have an army of corporate PACs backing her -- she has you. We can only win this together.

**[What's holding you back?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890514/7f51f7bc/4df53155/4ef1933c/4118836056/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200227.3nd__982__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

\-- Team MJ

_*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890514/7f51f7bc/4df53155/4ef1933c/4118836056/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200227.3nd__982__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|

body:

---
Hi Friend, As we count down the hours until #LeapDay2020, we are working overtime to make sure we meet our February fundraising goals. In order launch the next phase of our ambitious plan to win this primary, we set a goal this week of an additional $17k by Sunday. The good news: after our successful fundraisers in San Francisco and Oakland this week, we are more than half way there! But in order to expand our field organizing program and contact thousands of voters, we need to raise an [additional $8,000 by Sunday](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IwE/ni0YAA/t.2zn/bfwT-5StRp2JPB1kEpWNTA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v05-2Fi7D9J-2Fqhj-2F46hEBctJ7P-2FqeWsVA6iVYTz9NXF04yBMZQPVgEN-2Fkj3wTlX4eMmou7Ay8BJNVw7-2BMaYkAYqmnXeuPs180N9SUgKYiBOPV-2F4319gu6zv0jEBknfAQi-2FxquvIXpPMSbblhHcvuibgatA1Fj3WY7VJMOM84BNaAWZ-2B1hYqmdYixUtyQmEcOCmAxQj-2BfFep-2FBobWKM6-2BVEPprw-3D-3D/Cx7b). name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Green New Deal? NO WAY
body:
No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-ndyhkkt-ahkdjtlkr-n/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndyhkkt-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,Of all the bad ideas out in Washington, D.C., **Bernie Sanders** and **AOC's** _" Green New Deal"_ could be one of the all-time worst for Wisconsin. **NOW is the time for Wisconsin to fight back, before it's too late!** [NO Green New Deal - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndyhkkt-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [NO Green New Deal - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndyhkkt-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [NO Green New Deal - $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndyhkkt-ahkdjtlkr-t/) Sadly, this isn't some hypothetical battle. Their plans are REAL, and the impact is devastating for Wisconsin.
* One of the biggest targets in the plan is agriculture, specifically methane-producing cows. Let's see how well that goes over in **America's Dairyland.**
* The "Green New Deal" would target the **manufacturing** sector hard, despite Wisconsin having one of the strongest manufacturing economies of any state.
* The Impact? **98,200 jobs at risk** , and **$270 per month** (every month!) in higher energy costs. Not to mention phasing our air travel and gas-powered vehicles, and including a government takeover of health care as an add-on.

So, all in all it's a great idea, as long as you don't **eat cheese** , **drink mil** k, **drive a car** , **fly in an airplane** , **pay an energy bill** , or know a friend, neighbor, or family member with a **manufacturing job**. Please, I hope you'll join me in standing up to this horrible, backward idea. Thanks,Scott FitzgeraldP.S. Too many people hear and say they support the "Green New Deal" without knowing a thing about it, especially its impact on Wisconsin. It's going to take strong leaders to fight back against Bernie Sanders and AOC in Washington... and their bad ideas! [Click here to join us with a gift of $10, $20, or even $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndyhkkt-ahkdjtlkr-i/)! Thanks - Fitz
## **Join The Fight**
• Receive Campaign Updates
• Volunteer
• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.
## **Forward and Share**
• Forward This Email To Friends
• Facebook: FitzgeraldForWI
• Twitter: FitzgeraldForWI | [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndyhkkt-ahkdjtlkr-u/)| [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndyhkkt-ahkdjtlkr-o/)| [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ndyhkkt-ahkdjtlkr-b/)

Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
PO Box 102
Juneau, WI 53039

Dear Friend, I'll keep this very short this morning out of necessity - my daughter is going in for surgery to repair a broken bone in her hand. Should be routine. Yes, it's costing us a small fortune out of pocket. Luckily her mom and I can manage it. One of my volunteers told me they were in the pharmacy yesterday and saw people actually walk away without their prescriptions because they couldn't afford them. And how will the corona virus stress our health care system? Unfortunately, I think we're going to find out. Yesterday I told you we had $2,307.23 to reach our February goal. We had some very generous contributions and we took a chunk out of that - we've only got $1,317 to go. And it's a leap year so we've got an extra day to get there. There's a lot going on that I'd like to talk about - like an election in four short days! But I've got one to get to school and then off to the hospital. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
In just a moment I’m going to ask you to make a donation before this month’s deadline, but first, I need to explain why your contributions are so important. | |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15520655/163872151/664205141?refcode=em022820-1-header&refcode2=79035e93-475a-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTAzNWU5My00NzVhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTzuEjAm9rCs8hYdxM_kaGdHc9gfpiFikon79nbDCBY=) **** | | Friend, in just a moment I’m going to ask you to make a donation before this month’s deadline, but first, I need to explain why your contributions are so important.

Mitch McConnell and his Republican Senate majority have a stranglehold on every law that is passed in Washington. By controlling the federal courts, cutting taxes for the wealthy, and making life harder for working people, they are using their power to advance the interests of billionaires and the corporate interests who finance their campaigns before anyone else.

This helps Donald Trump, who has personally made David Perdue’s re-election his top Senate priority in 2020.

**Trump knows both of their electoral fortunes will be decided by how Georgia votes in November — where not one but TWO U.S. Senate seats will be decided.**

Polling shows Perdue’s approval rating below 50%, and support for Democrats is surging throughout the state. Georgia is THE battleground state where Republicans are making their stand — _and we have the opportunity to defeat them._

**[The latest polling has our race within THREE PERCENT, so here’s the ask: Will you donate right now and help me end McConnell’s majority once and for all? clean_body: In just a moment I’m going to ask you to make a donation before this month’s deadline, but first, I need to explain why your contributions are so important. | | | | = ** | | Friend, in just a moment I’m going to ask you to make a donation before this month’s deadline, but first, I need to explain why your contributions are so important. Mitch McConnell and his Republican Senate majority have a stranglehold on every law that is passed in Washington. By controlling the federal courts, cutting taxes for the wealthy, and making life harder for working people, they are using their power to advance the interests of billionaires and the corporate interests who finance their campaigns before anyone else. This helps Donald Trump, who has personally made David Perdue’s re-election his top Senate priority in 2020. Trump knows both of their electoral fortunes will be decided by how Georgia votes in November — where not one but TWO U.S. Senate seats will be decided. Polling shows Perdue’s approval rating below 50%, and support for Democrats is surging throughout the state. Georgia is THE battleground state where Republicans are making their stand — and we have the opportunity to defeat them. = | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = We can’t afford another term where the needs of working people are ignored. Yours truly, Teresa PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

name: Charles Booker
subject: I need to thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Everyone knows we’re running against Mitch McConnell. But we are running against a whole lot more than Mitch.
#
I need to thank you all. I emailed last night about our end of month fundraising goal, and as soon as that message hit inboxes, we saw a big surge of donations. It’s powerful, and it gives me hope that this is going to work.
Everyone knows we’re running against Mitch McConnell.
But we are running against a whole lot more than Mitch.
We are taking on a Democratic establishment that doesn’t believe a Medicare for All + Green New Deal progressive can win in Kentucky.
We are taking on the big-money machine that keeps people like _US_ out, and keeps corporations, lobbyists and special interests in control.
[**Can you make a $5 donation before our monthly deadline to help us take on all the powers that be? We’re just $14k away from hitting the goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-20200228-am?refcode=em20200228-am)
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15521338/163878616/983184800?refcode=em20200228-am&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjM3NjgyZC00YTVhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G1YJ2bKF80IMfwuQXiEX9E9vBc6ec-Malkpp9fZaJz4=)**
This is a campaign of US, for US, and by US. If we live by that creed, we are going to pull off upset after upset. We are going to upset the big-money donors. We are going to upset the DSCC which endorsed against us. And most of all, we are going to upset Mitch McConnell, because he’ll never see us coming.
[**Add your $5 donation right now before tomorrow night’s big deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-20200228-am?refcode=em20200228-am)
Thank you for believing in what WE can accomplish together.
\- Charles Booker

Peter,

**Today is the last day of early voting and I wanted to share an amazing thing with you. **

In our race to replace an 8-term incumbent, there has been over $2,000,000 dollars spent by our democratic opponents and yet we still have a great chance to win the nomination on Tuesday. [**Help us finish the job!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15524842/163906140/776973499?refcode=em022820&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2JjZmQ2Ni01NDVhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OE0OhP1fvakL4p5SqOXvWS5AjXQWjeAUaKAHqKhLDU=)

**This is because we have the backing of the people: **
* Our campaign has received more individual donations than anyone else in the race.
* Our campaign has earned the support of every Democratic group to endorse in this election.
* Our campaign has earned the support of both the Austin Chronicle and Houston Chronicle.
* Our campaign has knocked on nearly 40,000 doors in our district.
* Our campaign has received more donations from inside our district than all of our Democratic opponents and Michael McCaul combined.

[LEt's finish the job!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15524843/163906141/776973499?refcode=em022820&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2JjZmQ2Ni01NDVhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OE0OhP1fvakL4p5SqOXvWS5AjXQWjeAUaKAHqKhLDU=)
The incumbent Republican we are facing is one of the wealthiest members of Congress. Money alone will never defeat him; he is worth over $300 million. It will take a movement of people, meeting voters in person, to overcome his corporate cash and gerrymandered advantage.

**That is why we can win.** Our campaign has the people power to challenge that kind of candidate. We went up against McCaul in 2018 with him outspending us nearly 4 to 1 and we turned a 19% GOP advantage to just 4% on Election Day.

[**Help us finish the job and chip in to our campaign so we can win on Tuesday.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15524844/163906142/776973499?refcode=em022820&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2JjZmQ2Ni01NDVhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OE0OhP1fvakL4p5SqOXvWS5AjXQWjeAUaKAHqKhLDU=)

Mike Siegel

name: Bill Olson
subject: Remember Washington and Lee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j0AMFELktl6OuRU&b=3ATdpXz9FZfNe7lBbEVmOA

Hi Peter

You know, I believe those who do not know history are doomed to repeat it.

But the young socialists- like AOC- are taking that proverb as some sort of challenge!

Washington and Lee University in Lexington, VA is the latest front in the culture wars for the insane left:

Students at a Virginia law school are asking the administration to remove portraits of 'controversial' figures George Washington and Robert E. Lee from their graduation diplomas.

Current students as well as some alumni and staff at the Washington & Lee University School of Law are circulating a petition to allow graduates the option of omitting pictures of the university's namesakes.

Now understand, that the university was named for George Washington and Robert E. Lee in 1870. That means that every single person who worked there or attended there knew what it was named, BEFORE going there and complaining about it!

The "woke" Left has gone insane, trying to take away our liberties and make every part of our lives bow to their "feelings". They must be stopped!

I'm going up against one of those insufferable new "woke" liberals in a swing district- Darren Soto.

Unlike him, I'm a working class guy who loves God and my country. I'm 100% behind the President and 100% for America!

We need to oust extreme Democrats like Darren Soto, who is way to the left of Florida, and send pro-Constitution representatives to Congress!

Most importantly, we need to make the crazy Democrats pay dearly for what they are doing to our Constitution and to the country.

I need your help today!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j0AMFELktl6OuRU&b=3ATdpXz9FZfNe7lBbEVmOA
I need your help today- to make the Democrats pay, and replace Darren Soto and stop impeachment! Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j0AMFELktl6OuRU&b=3ATdpXz9FZfNe7lBbEVmOA

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j0AMFELktl6OuRU&b=3ATdpXz9FZfNe7lBbEVmOA
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

The Democrats are going to lose in 2020 with Trump at the top of the ticket- so let's send him a Congress that prefers Liberty over "woke"!

Let's get this done!

Friends --

**We’re sure you have heard the news that unmarked and illegal campaign mailers from a “mysterious” outside group have been sent out to voters promoting one of our opponents.**

What’s clear is that our opponent Sara Jacobs stands to benefit from these illegal mailers the most. Her campaign should denounce them, but it’s very likely it was orchestrated by the super PAC aligned with her campaign -- the one funded exclusively by her billionaire grandparents.

We don’t know about you, but we’re getting a little tired of billionaires throwing their weight around to buy elections. And we certainly never expect this to happen in our own backyard:

**[We only have a few days to fight back, so we set a goal of raising $60,000 for last-minute digital and field outreach before Super Tuesday. Right now, we are 32% of the way there. Can you help close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15528656/163942166/1136511447?refcode=em-200228-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjE2ZjQ2Yy02MTVhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAcCPRp35gszySeW_okPUKqzIgydq21CF-0OWHOhqH0=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15528657/163942167/1136511447?refcode=em-200228-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjE2ZjQ2Yy02MTVhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAcCPRp35gszySeW_okPUKqzIgydq21CF-0OWHOhqH0=) **[Donate ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q1-2020?refcode=em-200228-all-a)**
Trust us, Georgette would much rather be talking about the issues that matter most for our community in these final days:

Issues like improving transit and housing access in San Diego, and how we can leverage the federal government to protect our environment and keep polluters in check.

But right now -- in light of this news -- it is so important that we **[close the gap on this goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15528658/163942168/1136511447?refcode=em-200228-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjE2ZjQ2Yy02MTVhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAcCPRp35gszySeW_okPUKqzIgydq21CF-0OWHOhqH0=)**

Thank you for your generosity,

_Team Gómez_

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: History Made In t-Minus 4 Days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Dear Peter ,
You have the opportunity to cast your vote for our next President on Tuesday, March 3. Early voting for Democrats is up 32% compared to 2016, and we need to continue this momentum into Super Tuesday. Make a plan and go vote - our future depends upon it.
Elections have consequences. And while Tennessee families deserve elected officials who will pass legislation and fight for policies that foster a better quality of life for all, Republicans chose to focus on harming communities and families rather than addressing any immediate and impending danger.
America is on the brink of a serious virus outbreak. But on Thursday, Governor Bill Lee addressed the state for the third time this year, not about the coronavirus, but about his plan to put guns in the hands of the untrained and unlicensed, a sure way of perpetuating situations which have already caused so much carnage and slaughter of innocents in schools, churches, communities, and homes. Governor Lee’s plan for permitless gun carry means anyone can carry a concealed weapon without a background check. Anyone will be able to carry a gun into a school, hospital, church, or grocery store.
93% of Tennesseans, including Republicans and gun-owning households, support requiring a permit. Law enforcement and the military are against permitless carry. So why is Governor Lee pushing it? Why does he insist on putting Tennessee families at risk against the wishes of a vast majority of Tennesseans and law enforcement?
The coronavirus is a real threat to our families and country, yet the state’s leader and other Republicans in Nashville and DC choose their misplaced priorities over what’s best for us. We cannot afford to elect more politicians who gamble with lives.
You have the opportunity to cast your vote for our next President on Tuesday. Make a plan and go vote, our lives depend upon it.
See You At The Ballot Box,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
- Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
REPUBLICAN SENATOR BILL POWERS
ENDANGERS HIS CONSTITUENTS
Last year, Senator Bill Powers (R-Clarksville) campaigned for his special election seat saying a vote for him would be a vote against vouchers. Three hours after he was sworn in, he voted for vouchers.
Last week, just moments before Governor Bill Lee's permit-less carry announcement, Senator Powers was posing for pictures with an NRA lobbyist. His district is home to a military base, and we know that the military is not in favor of permitless gun carry as it endangers the lives of their personnel. It will be very interesting to see how Sen. Powers chooses to vote - with his constituents or with the NRA. .
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/ERzQFInXkAItNW0.jpg]
VOTE IN THE PRESIDENTIAL PRIMARY
In just 4 days, we’ll head to the polls to cast our vote for who will be our Democratic Presidential Nominee and ultimately the next president. Check your registration, find your polling site, and make a plan to vote. [http://bit.ly/tnvote20]
http://bit.ly/tnvote20 [http://bit.ly/tnvote20]

https://www.facebook.com/events/638111180345800/ [https://www.facebook.com/events/638111180345800/]
Join us on Thursday, March 26th from 6:00-8:00 PM CT for the TNDP Blue Cocktail Memphis in support of our 2020 candidate recruitment and support program. All tickets and sponsorships will go directly toward supporting and empowering Democratic candidates in 2020. Tickets are $25.00 and sponsorship opportunities are available! Register now! [https://www.facebook.com/events/638111180345800/]

At the DNC Convention this July in Milwaukee, Tennessee's 73 Delegates are expected to be a deciding influence in the race for the Democratic Presidential Nomination. In this episode, Now You Know host and TNDP Chair, Mary Mancini, sits down with TNDP Party Affairs Director Maria Brewer to discuss the Delegate Selection Process, its history, and why it's important to our democracy. clean_body: [] Dear Peter , You have the opportunity to cast your vote for our next President on Tuesday, March 3. Early voting for Democrats is up 32% compared to 2016, and we need to continue this momentum into Super Tuesday. Make a plan and go vote - our future depends upon it. Elections have consequences. And while Tennessee families deserve elected officials who will pass legislation and fight for policies that foster a better quality of life for all, Republicans chose to focus on harming communities and families rather than addressing any immediate and impending danger. America is on the brink of a serious virus outbreak. But on Thursday, Governor Bill Lee addressed the state for the third time this year, not about the coronavirus, but about his plan to put guns in the hands of the untrained and unlicensed, a sure way of perpetuating situations which have already caused so much carnage and slaughter of innocents in schools, churches, communities, and homes. Governor Lee’s plan for permitless gun carry means anyone can carry a concealed weapon without a background check. Anyone will be able to carry a gun into a school, hospital, church, or grocery store. 93% of Tennesseans, including Republicans and gun-owning households, support requiring a permit. Law enforcement and the military are against permitless carry. So why is Governor Lee pushing it? Why does he insist on putting Tennessee families at risk against the wishes of a vast majority of Tennesseans and law enforcement? The coronavirus is a real threat to our families and country, yet the state’s leader and other Republicans in Nashville and DC choose their misplaced priorities over what’s best for us. We cannot afford to elect more politicians who gamble with lives. You have the opportunity to cast your vote for our next President on Tuesday. Make a plan and go vote, our lives depend upon it. See You At The Ballot Box, [] - Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party REPUBLICAN SENATOR BILL POWERS ENDANGERS HIS CONSTITUENTS Last year, Senator Bill Powers (R-Clarksville) campaigned for his special election seat saying a vote for him would be a vote against vouchers. Three hours after he was sworn in, he voted for vouchers. Last week, just moments before Governor Bill Lee's permit-less carry announcement, Senator Powers was posing for pictures with an NRA lobbyist. His district is home to a military base, and we know that the military is not in favor of permitless gun carry as it endangers the lives of their personnel. It will be very interesting to see how Sen. Powers chooses to vote - with his constituents or with the NRA. . [] VOTE IN THE PRESIDENTIAL PRIMARY In just 4 days, we’ll head to the polls to cast our vote for who will be our Democratic Presidential Nominee and ultimately the next president. Check your registration, find your polling site, and make a plan to vote. [] [] TNDP BLUE COCKTAIL: MEMPHIS [] Join us on Thursday, March 26th from 6:00-8:00 PM CT for the TNDP Blue Cocktail Memphis in support of our 2020 candidate recruitment and support program. All tickets and sponsorships will go directly toward supporting and empowering Democratic candidates in 2020. Tickets are $25.00 and sponsorship opportunities are available! Register now! [] LISTEN NOW: TNDP PODCAST At the DNC Convention this July in Milwaukee, Tennessee's 73 Delegates are expected to be a deciding influence in the race for the Democratic Presidential Nomination. In this episode, Now You Know host and TNDP Chair, Mary Mancini, sits down with TNDP Party Affairs Director Maria Brewer to discuss the Delegate Selection Process, its history, and why it's important to our democracy. Listen Now! [] [] 2 weeks ago, we spoke with Tennessee Advocates for Planned Parenthood Executive Director, Francie Hunt. Give it a listen - Now You Know: Women's Reproductive Rights [] Stand with families, women, and caregivers. I wanted to make sure my fundraising team’s note got to the top of your inbox.
We’re trying to reach as many Hoosiers as possible this month. 2020 is a critical year for American democracy and we want everyone to be able to put some skin in the game.

We have **_ONE MORE DAY until our end-of-month deadline_** , Peter. That's it.

We set a high goal this month because we've got a tough road ahead in the next stage of this election -- but we have to get through the primary first. We need to turn out every voter we can before the polls close on Tuesday.

And if we want to beat Sen. John Cornyn, we're going to have to set some even bigger goals moving forward. I'll be honest, **we 're falling behind on this goal**, but we can still hit it with your help.

**Every donation is being matched right now to make _double_ the impact on this race, so if just 7 more people from your area donate by midnight, I think we'll be able to hit this goal out of the park. [Will you be one of those 7 people?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890510/7f51f7bc/4df74b21/4ef1946a/667737665/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200228.1nd__984__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
**[**MAKE A MATCHED DONATION NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890510/7f51f7bc/4df74b21/4ef1946a/667737665/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200228.1nd__984__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
We **NEED** to come out of this month strong, and the primary is only four days away! **_Now is the time_** that we need your help. We can beat Sen. John Cornyn and his special interest war chest, but we have to hit every single one of our goals.

**[Can you help us hit our goal tonight and come out of Tuesday's primary in the strongest position to beat Sen. Cornyn in November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890510/7f51f7bc/4df74b21/4ef1946a/667737665/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200228.1nd__984__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thank you for being in this fight with us.

Taylor Klos,
TX Finance Director
MJ for Texas

name: Team Messner
subject: Corky's Updates from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2399fc26812257e1/083045c52865b936c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ Donate Now! ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2399fc26812257e1/61a828d923fb78c9c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ Contact Us ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2399fc26812257e1/fb1298a752002520c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. | |
---
**Corky: Senator Shaheen Represents the Party of Extremes on Abortion**
New Hampshire Senator Jeanne Shaheen this week condemned U.S. Senate Republicans’ efforts to pass measures related to late-term abortions, taking to the floor of the Senate to speak against both proposals – one would have banned abortion after 20 weeks, and the other would have required doctors to provide care to survivors of failed abortions.
Both Shaheen and New Hampshire’s other Senator, Maggie Hassan, voted against both measures, which failed to pass. As one conservative news outlet noted: “Senator Shaheen has long been an advocate of fewer restrictions on abortion...Shaheen’s leadership during her days as governor resulted in New Hampshire having virtually no restrictions on abortion up to the day of birth.”

Corky notes: “Senators Shaheen and Hassan represent the party of extremes on the issue of abortion....I stand with the women of the pro-life movement who are fighting for those who can’t stand up for themselves.”
|
---
**IN THE NEWS**
_The New Hampshire Union Leader_ updated its coverage of the cancellation of Corky’s Feb. 18th Dartmouth College appearance with **[news](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2399fc26812257e1/a00a1de4e9194b26c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** that the Dartmouth College Democrats demanded Corky apologize for adding to the furor that erupted on campus. They claimed he “exploited” dubious threats the College Republicans who were to host the event received, “to raise money for his campaign.”
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2399fc26812257e1/ee50f535930e5619c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
In response, Corky wrote a letter to the Dartmouth College Democrats, explaining “We saw the College Republicans’ event as an opportunity for a free and honest exchange of ideas, and I certainly regret an indefinite cancellation robs us of this opportunity. I must clarify that contrary to your timeline of events, I did not ‘back out’ of the event before its cancellation...Further, I should point out we were shown at least one tweet that referred to the potential for physical violence, and we were disappointed by the inflammatory statements and name-calling from some of your leadership and membership.”

He ended his message with an offer to meet with the group. “Perhaps this whole incident might serve as an example to others, that people of different political persuasions can sit together and have a thoughtful, productive conversation. In keeping with that spirit of civility and openness, I’d be pleased to come to campus to meet and listen to your concerns.”
|
---
**QUICK PIC**
Corky joined some locals in Alton recently, stopping by to support a local Cub Scout troop fundraising breakfast.
|
---
**Campaign Notes: Bettie Lamontagne Endorses Corky**
Prominent GOP activist Bettie Lamontagne has announced her public endorsement of Corky Messner, after sharing with insiders last spring she would be supporting him.

“From humble beginnings, graduating from West Point and serving his country, then building an extremely successful business against the odds, Corky's life journey and experiences make him the overall best choice from either party to serve as our next U.S. Senator,” says Lamontagne.
“Bettie’s support means so much, considering her GOP pedigree in New Hampshire,” says Corky. “She has earned respect and admiration in Republican circles as a woman of intellect and integrity, and I welcome her endorsement.”

Lamontagne provided policy advice to the campaign as Messner prepared to launch his effort to unseat Senator Jeanne Shaheen, and he expects to bring her back in that capacity.

A former teacher who serves on several community nonprofit boards and is an advocate in the special needs community for her foster son, Lamontagne has long been active in New Hampshire politics. She was a partner in the 2010 U.S. Senate and 2012 Gubernatorial campaigns of her husband, Ovide, serving as a policy advisor, campaign literature writer, web content author, and surrogate speaker. During the 2016 Presidential Primary, she served as New Hampshire campaign co-chair for Presidential candidate Carly Fiorina. Lamontagne currently is Treasurer of the Greater Manchester Republican Women’s Club and is serving her second term on the Board of the New Hampshire Republican Women’s Federation.
|
---

| | Hey Team, I just left our morning meeting and wanted to make sure you were filled in. Right now, energy is high among our staff. This weekend, yet again, we over-performed during the Convention Delegate Caucuses. Turns out, beating a 40-year incumbent is tough. But we don't play by their rules. We're not pushing party insiders to the polls - we're bringing in new faces and communities that have been shut out of the process far too long. And we're making an impact. This is all on the heels of a big debate win by Joe. He's so fired up. During the car ride home last Tuesday, he couldn't stop talking about the 300+ supporters that gathered outside the debate, holding signs, cheering in the pouring rain, the reactions online, and the messages from folks like you that get our emails. February is usually a slump month. But not for the Kennedy campaign. We're just getting started. **One thing I'll ask before I let you go. We're deeply invested in winning this race. So I'm asking you to make an investment in this campaign, too. Every single dollar we receive makes an impact on the success of this race.[ Click this link to make an investment in our campaign. ](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903bb/55b66746/234396c4/80fc845/189054071/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** Thanks for being part of this. Friend,

Our end of month fundraising deadline hits on February 29th, but this month we’re asking for something a little bit different.
[ **Invest $3 in our campaign** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c967ebe1ba6547268c87661ff86d214f&_e=-iD95h9Zfhs9IUMQP2JQmQuUZ7-VH-p0PAE04c0Afahi0KGMOaPWXLX3BpVvYHzCN3pNJVVMg2-csvhrk7pQO4PFRbmf8pkf2NTSi7zOECLSE4YNCprICAxl6v_f01JRayvIEr_KOkAICQ9IvzcIVNVqguXlXnXJp8rbko6L0LKu3SViCvYsHjtaDrAXJ0EvTlHmSwfjuLeM6Xt-egXTYhwSf7S1GHXB3UJ98GWJwcjRwwu_HMiZ4RK5OxRFNMxlTE4EkRjDkoPghjDPW738lw1UcWOAgmDjW4yh9KUl3mrMkfhTT0d3TA3LdoExzgTompuuSz3D4X3StT96tKhHWRNIgSR5-ivkzh-3pBF6TqUu9UKh2xVDOZr40yNPNxnp7iculbA02ol1cTHzr31F0C4RsY1iYP76Rvjh5_xyNJ5356iF1_QleL-b8lDBduvGTksbQ8R5RxB8Lzn5Fr4R3fKJuKxLYoRKxXG_PRuQPeOK4Qym1DGV_yAOfo6B4v9g)
The Holcomb Crew is made up of Hoosiers across Indiana who believe in Putting People First and driving Indiana forward. We believe that together we can make Indiana a safer, smarter, and more prosperous place for all Hoosiers.

Every member of our crew has invested in our campaign and each donation we ask for is exactly that — an investment. It’s an investment in another four years of a people-first approach, economic success for ALL Hoosiers, and progress towards a 21st century Indiana.

This February we’re asking for just a $3 investment. With your investment, you’ll be joining with your fellow Hoosiers to help us invest in field staff, advertising and the resources we’ll need to win!

**[If you want to help us continue Putting People First for another four years, please consider investing just $3 in our campaign by using the button below.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c967ebe1ba6547268c87661ff86d214f&_e=-iD95h9Zfhs9IUMQP2JQmQuUZ7-VH-p0PAE04c0Afahi0KGMOaPWXLX3BpVvYHzCN3pNJVVMg2-csvhrk7pQO4PFRbmf8pkf2NTSi7zOECLSE4YNCprICAxl6v_f01JRayvIEr_KOkAICQ9IvzcIVNVqguXlXnXJp8rbko6L0LKu3SViCvYsHjtaDrAXJ0EvTlHmSwfjuLeM6Xt-egXTYhwSf7S1GHXB3UJ98GWJwcjRwwu_HMiZ4RK5OxRFNMxlTE4EkRjDkoPghjDPW738l9hJ9lOgjB8Gika1mDa4uebNy8SW6YjF2bD7vwc4DimbEDoN9UHZyO1WB8a-giUK-9TldmhVZ9F4qEohHxpoVEgZY4b03ZvxHUZd0mpZTNJplP9udj4m91g6Y-v7y60VW4jebEKp36ses7fSEaHG5hVQDLonOzZVeA__wYEeGleBCHXX0MsS3W62lUHUbmNbcs13xGlZQr4pgYqlIN4jijibZOLL5fUv_318VLLiRXYp)**

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Election Watch: Bernie Sanders, Super Tuesday, and Contested Conventions
body:
| | Keeping Christian voters informed on important election developments!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjlS2gfivznXOo2VQj2oHvWUicC2ink5kpEe1tzpq5EY0wmztHuwaUhWLVnawUV6UT0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200228com01&n=1)
| Peter, Three states have now voted in the Democratic Party primaries (or caucuses) and we have a clear leader -- Bernie Sanders. It seems we’ve just started, but it could be mostly over in a few days. Or it could drag on all the way to the summer, depending on what happens this week. The biggest state so far votes Saturday (South Carolina with 54 delegates), and then three days later is Super Tuesday, when 14 states vote at once, including big vote totals in California and Texas. By the end of that night, roughly 40% of the votes will be cast. The most likely outcomes are Bernie Sanders grabbing an insurmountable lead, or a historical twist that could bring chaos. Bernie Sanders, the 78-year-old senator from Vermont, seems an unlikely choice to win the nomination of a major party. For one thing, he doesn’t belong to a party. He’s an independent, and the longest-serving independent in congressional history, though he does caucus with the Senate Democrats. He’s also a socialist in a land built by capitalism, and an “old white guy” in a party that often prefers anything but. But here he is, leading the pack. Though an independent, Bernie Sanders speaks for the left-wing of the Democratic party. In fact, GovTrack rates him as the most liberal member of the entire Senate. He supports gay marriage, the Green New Deal, and additional gun restrictions - and he opposes restrictions on abortion as well as religious freedom issues supported by many Christians. [continue reading...](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjlS2gfivznXOo2VQj2oHvWUicC2ink5kpEe1tzpq5EY053xAl6bTx-CZaEsH-Tt8Vk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200228com01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjlS2gfivznXOo2VQj2oHvWUicC2ink5kpEe1tzpq5EY053xAl6bTx-CZaEsH-Tt8Vk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200228com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200228com01&n=4)

Team,

As Sri's Finance Director, especially as we near the end-of-month deadline, I'm constantly hitting refresh on our donation stats to make sure we're hitting our goals, but this deadline is a little different.

With only 4 days until the primary, Sri asked me to reach out because we _have_ to hit our goal (only $5500 to go!) to ensure that we've got the resources we need to knock on doors, to make sure our volunteers have clipboards and supplies to make calls, and to get out the vote.

**[Friend, if you haven't made a contribution yet, now is the best time to do so.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bzkmu1GOmx3VYzaapo_aMA9v8gv5XN_bi7FldEvq6u4=/FO61dhwqNfiRYh4GAwoF6Su8k2yMapOqgyHuOUhsguw=?refcode=20200228&amount=25&recurring=1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bzkmu1GOmx3VYzaapo_aMA9v8gv5XN_bi7FldEvq6u4=/FO61dhwqNfiRYh4GAwoF6Su8k2yMapOqgyHuOUhsguw=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20200228)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bzkmu1GOmx3VYzaapo_aMA9v8gv5XN_bi7FldEvq6u4=/FO61dhwqNfiRYh4GAwoF6Su8k2yMapOqgyHuOUhsguw=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20200228)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bzkmu1GOmx3VYzaapo_aMA9v8gv5XN_bi7FldEvq6u4=/FO61dhwqNfiRYh4GAwoF6Su8k2yMapOqgyHuOUhsguw=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20200228)** **[Chip in: $150](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bzkmu1GOmx3VYzaapo_aMA9v8gv5XN_bi7FldEvq6u4=/FO61dhwqNfiRYh4GAwoF6Su8k2yMapOqgyHuOUhsguw=?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=20200228)** **[Chip in: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bzkmu1GOmx3VYzaapo_aMA9v8gv5XN_bi7FldEvq6u4=/FO61dhwqNfiRYh4GAwoF6Su8k2yMapOqgyHuOUhsguw=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=20200228)** **[Or, chip in another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bzkmu1GOmx3VYzaapo_aMA9v8gv5XN_bi7FldEvq6u4=/FO61dhwqNfiRYh4GAwoF6Su8k2yMapOqgyHuOUhsguw=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20200228)** The _Houston Chronicle_ knows that Sri's the best chance we've got to flip this seat -- between his experience and commitment to diplomacy, and how much he cares for this community, he's the leader that Texas' 22nd district deserves.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

Right now, America is afflicted by a President who delights in division, cruelty, lies, chaos, and self-congratulation. We are better than that, and Americans deserve better in the Oval Office. **That's why I will vote for Joe Biden in the Virginia presidential primary on Tuesday.** | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1719/3e0906/78d6a8c5/3e30c22f/1042497217/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-stand-with-tim-and-joe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20200228_PET_TK_Biden&source=20200228_PET_TK_Biden")
---
Barack Obama wisely chose Joe as his partner in the White House, and for eight years, Vice President Biden worked hand-in-hand with President Obama to rescue the American economy from catastrophe, expand health care to millions of people, revive creative diplomacy to keep Americans safe, tackle global challenges like climate change, and appoint high-quality people across the executive and judicial branches of our government. As a Senator, I saw first-hand Joe's role in these accomplishments.
It is sad to have a President who no one holds up as a role model for America's kids. By contrast, Joe Biden has exemplary heart, character, and experience. He reminds me of Harry S. Truman -- an outwardly ordinary man whose work ethic, faith in the goodness of everyday Americans, and love of country made him a great President.
[**I am proud to vote for Joe Biden, and if you're with me -- if you're ready for a President our kids can look up to -- I hope you'll add your name next to mine.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1719/3e0906/78d6a8c5/3e30c22e/1042497217/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-stand-with-tim-and-joe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+I+am+proud+to+vote+for+Joe+Biden+and+if+&utm_campaign=20200228_PET_TK_Biden&source=20200228_PET_TK_Biden")
Thanks a lot.
Tim

* * *
|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1719/3e0906/78d6a8c5/3e30c22d/1042497217/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20200228_PET_TK_Biden&source=20200228_PET_TK_Biden") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1719/3e0906/78d6a8c5/3e30c22c/1042497217/VEsC/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20200228_PET_TK_Biden&source=20200228_PET_TK_Biden") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1719/3e0906/78d6a8c5/3e30c223/1042497217/VEsD/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20200228_PET_TK_Biden&source=20200228_PET_TK_Biden")

name: Pete Aguilar
subject: Wanted to make sure you saw Rep. Katie Porter's email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC |
body:
Hello Peter \-- my colleagues and I in the House are busy passing progressive legislation that helps all Americans, but my friend Katie Porter took the time last week to write an important message about the importance of coming together to beat Donald Trump. I wanted to make sure everyone had a chance to read it, so I've attached it below.

\- Pete

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rep. Katie Porter <info@progressivemajoritypac.com>
Date: Fri, Feb 21, 2020
Subject: What we need to win in November

Friends,

Donald Trump campaigned on "draining the swamp" of corruption. Yet, in the three years of the Trump administration, five members of Trump's cabinet have been forced to resign due to corruption. (Not to mention Trump's own abuse of power for political gain that led to his impeachment.)

These aren't anomalies. His policies are also designed to help his megadonors, not the working class or those in poverty:
* His tax bill for billionaires and corporations added nearly $2 trillion to the deficit while doing nothing for workers. In fact, he's trying to make up the money by kicking hundreds of thousands off food stamps and making it more difficult for people with disabilities to access benefits.

* When Congress wouldn't go along with his efforts to repeal the ACA, he turned to supporting a lawsuit aimed at undoing the law with no protections in place for people with pre-existing conditions.

* Trump's 2021 budget wish list includes cuts to Medicare and Medicaid and massive cuts to the Environmental Protection Agency with zero acknowledgment of the climate crisis we're in or the staggering impact it will have on our children.

This is who he's always been. He's going to continue to lie and mislead voters to hold onto power, and if we don't fight back, there's a real chance he could be re-elected.

Progressive Majority is fighting back against Trump and his agenda, working non-stop to protect and expand our majority in the House, and turning out crucial Democratic voters across the country in November. But donations have slowed down this week, so I'm writing to ask for your help.

If you care about stopping Trump, about protecting and expanding the progressive majority in Congress, I'm personally asking for your support today. We can win in November, but not without your help today: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressivemajoritypac**](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5cbe/5360b1c8/2d4f7daf/b071c62/3782697177/VEsH/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressivemajoritypac?refcode=PRO20200228&refcode2=DYd7BcwdQmNrED3cHwh9")

Thank you for everything you do,
Katie

| Progressive Majority PAC is leading the fight against Trump's dangerous and divisive agenda by helping elect progressive Democrats to Congress and protecting the gains we made in the midterms. This movement is powered by progressives like you. Chip in now [**here**](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5cbe/5360b1c8/2d4f7daf/b071c65/3782697177/VEsE/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-majority?refcode=footer") and help make it happen.

Progressive Majority PAC
410 1st St, SE
Suite 310
Washington, DC 20003 |
---|---|---
| Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC |
---|---|---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |
---|---|---
| If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5cbe/5360b1c8/2d4f7daf/b071c64/3782697177/VEsF/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/unsubscribe"). |

name: Jay Inslee
subject: SHARE: Climate change must be part of our strategy to take back the White House.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Polls prove it.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8424?t=3&akid=8036%2E868730%2E-iVvy6) Friend, I’ve been saying the same thing for months (heck, years): Climate change must be part of our strategy to take back the White House.
Climate change must be part of our strategy to take back the White House.
_Climate change must be part of our strategy to take back the White House._ Polls for years have shown that climate change is Donald Trump's most unpopular issue, and a poll released in January solidified it: 54% of respondents gave Trump a D or an F on climate, while just 21% gave him an A or a B. [**Ahead of Super Tuesday, remind voters that no matter the nominee for the Democratic Party, the focus MUST be on climate: Share my post on Donald Trump's biggest vulnerability -- climate change -- right now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8424?t=4&akid=8036%2E868730%2E-iVvy6) The debate on Tuesday night showed again that leadership in the party won't keep their simple promise: "We're going to talk about climate change early, often, and in depth." There was not ONE question about climate in South Carolina, despite the fact that the state has warmed by one-half to one degree in the last century, and sea level is rising 1.5 inches every decade. Voters know what's at stake -- let's remind them how we can address this crisis AND win the White House. Very truly yours, Jay | [SHARE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8424?t=5&akid=8036%2E868730%2E-iVvy6)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=8036%2E868730%2E-iVvy6). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---

clean_body: Democrats are moving further and further to the left, and our country’s future is at stake. Did you see David's email from yesterday? Democrats are moving further and further to the left, and our country’s future is at stake. Politicians like Kendra Horn and Bernie Sanders simply DO NOT reflect Oklahoma values. They are dangerous to our democracy and the economic achievements we have made under President Trump and his administration. There has never been a more vital time to support David as he fights to combat socialism and bring sanity to Washington. But we are still 50 donations away from our end-of-month goal! Our fundraising deadline is TOMORROW. Join David and President Trump in the fight against socialism by donating at the link below. Every donation counts, no matter the amount. Sincerely, Team Hill \-------Forwarded message------- From: David Hill Subject: The Fight Against Socialism Date: February 27th, 2020 As the Democratic Party continues to embrace a socialist agenda, our country’s future hangs in the balance. This election presents a clear choice: Either you support Democrats like Bernie Sanders and Kendra Horn and their socialist policies, or you support President Trump, this booming economy, and the conservative values we all hold dear. On Tuesday, I am voting for Donald Trump. We still don’t know which socialist Kendra Horn will support, but I do know that, with your help, we can keep her from voting for Nancy Pelosi as Speaker again. . February’s fundraising deadline is right around the corner, and we’ve set a goal of raising $3,000 before the month ends. If you are fed up with the dangerous political games being played in Washington, support Team Hill and donate today. Thanks for your support, David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | | ---|---|---|---

Can you help us out? I was also on CNN Thursday evening to comment on the Coronavirus response from our government. Thank you for all that you're doing to help! -John | Peter - Gov. Kasich recorded a short video message for you: The funds we raise go right back into helping us spread this message as far and wide as we can. . name: Dick Durbin
subject: Mitch McConnell is on the ballot in every Senate race in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
A Mitch McConnell-controlled Senate is guaranteed partisan gridlock for any Democratic President.
**[That's why we need a Blue Senate and that effort starts with Illinois. Contribute $5 now to help me win and I promise every dollar will be spent wisely and every dollar I don't need will be sent to states where we have the best chance to win.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-feb-2020?refcode=em200228i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
We can't afford another two years with the self-styled "Grim Reaper of the Senate" in charge.
Mitch is holding up hundreds of bipartisan bills that have passed the Democratic House: prescription drug price reform, background checks for gun sales, and protection for Americans with pre-existing conditions to name a few.
Peter, our strategy to flip the Senate and remove Mitch as Majority Leader is simple. First, we have to hold onto our Democratic-held seats, including mine in Illinois. Then, we have to flip just four GOP-held seats.
**[I'm running a lean and efficient re-election campaign in Illinois and I pledge to send every dollar I don't need to the key states where we have the best opportunities to flip a GOP seat. Contribute $5 now to flip the Senate.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-feb-2020?refcode=em200228i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-feb-2020?refcode=em200228i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4e43/42ab3cf4/60db19a5/135d5ed5/2867498438/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

Derek --

**FIRST:** Donald Trump's re-election campaign held over 80 events in Virginia.

**THEN:** A new poll showed that he could win in the Commonwealth.

NOW: The DNC has categorized Virginia as a "battleground" state -- meaning it is _anything_ but safe in 2020.

**Derek, we are the only ones who can prevent the GOP from winning back Virginia in November.** We hope you'll join us in building the largest grassroots campaign EVER in the Commonwealth. It's what we'll need to re-elect Mark and save Virginia from a Trump victory.

**[Can we count on you to pitch in right now?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5c6/53d9897e/530afa10/1c89879d/316011016/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-eomgoalnd?refcode=20200228_f_1_nd__491__&refcode2=ask2&amount=10") Through midnight TOMORROW, a group of generous donors will MATCH all contributions up to $11,000.**

body:
Our opponents have big money on their side. That’s okay. We’ve got something much more potent: our message.
#
We’re still $12,134 away from our big goal.
So we’re asking you for $5.
That’s how much Charles needs if we’re going to hit this goal in the final hours we have remaining before tomorrow’s midnight deadline. Please use this link to contribute so we can raise the resources we need to defeat Mitch McConnell:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-20200228-pm?refcode=em20200228-pm](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15537250/164021958/983184817?refcode=em20200228-pm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2RmZWE3Yi04MTVhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNIwZvcH_IyPtORA2_rD3xyKphY5yjXSbtr5uJ5uyCE=)
Our opponents have big money on their side.
They have millions in the bank from PACs, lobbyists, and special interests.
That’s okay. We’ve got something much more potent: our message.
We’re going to fight like hell for a Green New Deal to save this planet and create jobs. We’re going to make sure no one dies because they can’t afford health care by enacting Medicare for All. We’re going to bring unprecedented numbers of new voters out to vote for these ideals in November.
But we need to hit our modest goals to do that.
If everyone gives $5, we’ll hit our goal in no time and be able to share our message far and wide across Kentucky. Here’s that link again:

Team Booker

name: Team Putnam
subject: You can vote TODAY!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Did you know you can vote before next week's election? **You can beat the lines at the polls next Tuesday and lock your vote to elect a conservative outsider in Congress.** But the catch is, **today is your last day to vote early in the Texas Primary. ** The political establishment is watching this race very closely and they're hoping you won't vote early today, or even show up to the polls on election day. We have come too far to leave anything up to chance this election, and **Chris is hoping we can get a head start as we head into our final weekend of the campaign. ** **Let 's send a message to Kay Granger and her Washington lobbyist friends that Texas wants their voice back. Can we count on you to vote today? ** You can find more information by **visiting[votetexas.gov](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/chhkLJETS4PG2w53EdVZpw/hG9fwfAfL1tu4VS7iyIOHQ) or contact our campaign at [info@putnamfortexas.org.](mailto:info@putnamfortexas.org) ** Thank you for your commitment to vote this election. Team Putnam

body:
| | | Rep. Dave Loebsack sent a challenge to our supporters earlier -- to come up with 50 donations today to help get Rita to Washington in November. We haven't quite hit that mark yet. That's why I'm following up with some of our best supporters -- if everyone reading this donated right now, we'd meet and exceed Dave's challenge. Will you help us get there? Donate any amount right now: **[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2002-q1-rh-eom](https://act.myngp.com/el/ukQUxDxy5_xwWTQxePLeXQuBL8opqIEie7Tldvg-DK4=/W-Pame6XQUhLfXLOLhvQg85AiEiRKrMU9l8RmiSRnRU=?refcode=200229-email-pm)** \- Kim Kaiser
Finance Director **\----- forwarded message -----** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ukQUxDxy5_xwWTQxePLeXQuBL8opqIEie7Tldvg-DK4=/YFCuiboZy4LZKjTLr6MiM1PICL3z50UO7YCYUlM810g=?refcode=200229-email-pm) There's just one more day in February, and Rita's campaign still needs your help making sure they meet their fundraising goals. I know Rita has the experience we need so desperately in Washington. I've seen it myself -- it takes a strong person to be able to stand up for what's right in Congress, and Rita is the only person in this race who will fight to protect our families' health care, Social Security and education. **[Help me help Rita. I'm hoping I can get 50 people to donate today so they stay on track for their projections for March. Will you step up and be one of those 50?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ukQUxDxy5_xwWTQxePLeXQuBL8opqIEie7Tldvg-DK4=/W-Pame6XQUhLfXLOLhvQg85AiEiRKrMU9l8RmiSRnRU=?refcode=200229-email-pm)** I've known Rita for a long time, and I'm so happy she's running for this seat. I can think of no better person to fight for us in Washington. I'll be able to enjoy my retirement knowing our district is in good hands. **[That's why I'm challenging you to give today. We can't afford to let someone who puts partisanship before practical, positive change for our communities. Donate any amount and let's see if we can get 50 donations today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ukQUxDxy5_xwWTQxePLeXQuBL8opqIEie7Tldvg-DK4=/W-Pame6XQUhLfXLOLhvQg85AiEiRKrMU9l8RmiSRnRU=?refcode=200229-email-pm)** Congressman David Loebsack [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ukQUxDxy5_xwWTQxePLeXQuBL8opqIEie7Tldvg-DK4=/W-Pame6XQUhLfXLOLhvQg85AiEiRKrMU9l8RmiSRnRU=?refcode=200229-email-pm) | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa

| | Great news! Since it's a leap year, we have one extra day tomorrow to make our February fundraising deadline. Good thing too, since we're a bit behind -- [**I'm counting on you to join us**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f3f8/6cd27893/53c20ed1/15869caa/3594197240/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-02-28-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") and be one of the 4000 donors we need this month. The strength of our movement always comes from grassroots support. When I was first elected to the Senate, we built the biggest grassroots campaign that Oregon had ever seen. No one thought we could defeat an incumbent Republican Senator, but we did. _We did it together._ We're going to do the same thing in 2020 all across the country. We're going to take back the Senate and defeat Donald Trump. The path to a progressive tomorrow begins and ends with _us_. With you. [**We're less than a hundred donors away from our grassroots goal. Chip in today and let's get it done.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f3f8/6cd27893/53c20ed1/15869caa/3594197240/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-02-28-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Let's take back the Senate together in 2020. **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f3f8/6cd27893/53c20ed1/15869cab/3594197240/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-02-28-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f3f8/6cd27893/53c20ed1/15869ca8/3594197240/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-02-28-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f3f8/6cd27893/53c20ed1/15869ca9/3594197240/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-02-28-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f3f8/6cd27893/53c20ed1/15869ca6/3594197240/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-02-28-eom&refcode2=express-buttons")

subject: Marc Flores on Houston Podcast
body:
Marc joins local podcaster -- Jordan Baylor -- on his show

https://pod.co/offstage-with-jordan-baylor/os-10-marc-flores-becoming-the-change-you-want?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b3f4797a40-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_28_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b3f4797a40-32267927
Listen to Marc here!
Peter, have you seen this?

While out block walking, Marc met local Houston podcaster Jordan Baylor, and discussed with him why he was interested in becoming U.S. House Representative for District 18. Moved by Marc's zeal and passion, Jordan invited him to speak on his podcast.

Click here to listen to Marc's interview on Offstage with Jordan Baylor! (https://pod.co/offstage-with-jordan-baylor/os-10-marc-flores-becoming-the-change-you-want?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b3f4797a40-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_28_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b3f4797a40-32267927)

Despite our proximity to Election Day, we are still making a notable impact on members of our community. Nearly every day, Marc and the team have been out sharing our message and listening to your voices. With election day right around the corner, Marc wants to keep knocking on doors with all of the energy and manpower available to us. To do this, we need your help.

Donate $5 to help Marc focus on what's really important -- YOU. (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b3f4797a40-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_28_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b3f4797a40-32267927)

Help us keep up the momentum, and bring this movement straight to Washington, D.C.

Donate now! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b3f4797a40-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_28_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b3f4797a40-32267927)

**

body:

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200228-jeez?refcode=em200228-jeez&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Jeez, Louise... our fundraising numbers took a heck of a dip over the past few days and the deadline to catch up is tomorrow.
