name: John Philip Sousa IV
subject: Last Chance, Peter...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, I really think you must've missed this because... *
## DEADLINE IS TODAY
---
|
Dear Peter, You've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners -- and I'm so thankful for your commitment to our critical mission... **...but I noticed you have NOT yet Renewed Your Support for 2020.** Our highly-effective minority voter outreach radio ads have been airing in key minority markets in crucial swing states **since August** \-- and we just launched new ads in Michigan supporting veteran John James for U.S. Senate. **Peter, it's absolutely crucial we stay**ON THE AIR** all the way up through Election Day...** [...that's why I'm hoping and praying you'll **RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020** with a ONE-TIME or a MONTHLY donation of $20.20 today!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWOg&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=Z&z=Eh3OGhj&) | | [Renew Your Support with a _Monthly_ Donation of $20.20 Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EzVOFor&)
---
| [Renew Your Support with a _One-Time_ Donation of $20.20 Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWOg&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=Z&z=EtraBhv&)
---
**With Michael Bloomberg dumping _$2 BILLION_ into defeating President Trump this election, we really need you now more than ever, Peter!**
**TODAY IS THE DEADLINE, so I hope to see your response soon.**
_For America,_
\- John
P.S. _My original message to you with more details is below..._

* * *
| | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Peter, And so it begins... We've officially entered the Primary season with Iowa, New Hampshire, and Nevada behind us -- and it's still anyone's guess who the eventual Democratic nominee will be... **...but you and I don't have to wait to know that the nominee will be a tax-and-spend liberal who wants to return our country back to the Obama days...**_or worse_**!** [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EyPjJEX&) And if that's not bad enough -- now we have a liberal, gun-grabbing, "nanny"-state billionaire to contend with because... Michael Bloomberg has Committed to Spend $2 BILLION to Defeat President Trump this Election! Bloomberg's leaked strategy is to flood the states that Trump won by slim margins in 2016 including Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania... **...which all states where you and I helped Trump win by convincing minorities to vote for the President in unprecedented numbers. In fact...** Our minority voter outreach campaign (_inspired by Dr. Carson's candidacy_) turned out to be CRUCIAL in defeating Hillary Clinton and electing Donald Trump as President [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EMbOm5&) Peter, you've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners \-- and I truly believe that without your help **Donald Trump would not have won.** You should be proud that you played such a vital role in making President Trump's victory possible because without you... ...we'd be suffocating under Hillary Clinton's iron-fisted regime, the Supreme Court would've shifted far-Left for decades to come, and our beloved nation would've likely never recovered. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EzzU9NV&) It's in that same spirit of saving America from radical leftists that I'm writing to you today, Peter. You see... Our Mission to Reach Out to Minority Voters Didn't End with the Election of Donald Trump In fact, the Left's horrific slide into radical socialism, unveiled hatred for America, scorched-Earth tactics, and vile assault of President Trump has added a **new sense of urgency** and **higher stakes** to our mission. That's why we've continued our highly-successful minority outreach and radio advertising campaign to expose the Left's race-baiting lies and convince minorities to abandon the Democratic Party forever... ...a campaign that was inspired by Dr. Ben Carson's presidential and our historic effort to draft him to "Run Ben Run"! began with the first successful Presidential draft effort since Barry Gold Every election, Democrats promise minority voters the moon and the stars in return for their votes. Then, once the election is over, they abandon their promises and turn their backs on the minority voters who secured their victory. And if that doesn't work, Democrats just slander Republicans as racists to **SCARE** minorities into voting for liberals who DO NOT share their values. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EBRWykW&) But we're fed up with the Democrats' never-ending lies, ruthless scare-tactics, and race-baiting slander of conservatives... ...and we're **fighting back** by reaching out to minority voters with the truth that the lying Democrats offer little more than bribes, broken promises, and failed policies that lead to nothing but more of the same: disappointment, lousy schools, poverty, victimization, and anger. [Peter, I'm praying you'll RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 to help win this critical fight, but first let me explain just what is at stake.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EENiw5o&) [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EhXazG5&) As you know, hundreds of thousands of patriotic Americans like you made history when we convinced Dr. Ben Carson to run for President in 2016. **Together, we became the first successful Presidential draft effort since Barry Goldwater in 1964...** **...and we succeeded beyond anyone's wildest expectations in our ability to recruit minority voters to the Republican Party.** Since 2013, we have invested millions of dollars on radio, television and print advertisements, billboards, books and issue guides to minority voters exposing the **race-baiting lies** liberals have been spoon-feeding them about Republicans and our values for decades... And the results have been incredible. Our campaign proven, _time and time again_ , that radio outreach program to Blacks, Asians, Latinos/Hispanics and Women is NOT a "waste of time" as the talking heads and overpaid political consultants have been claiming for years. In fact, recent polling puts Trump's approval ratings at an astonishing 35 percent with Black Voters, 38 percent with Hispanics and 28 percent with Asians. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EVR5RBz&) **If President Trump ends up with even HALF of these numbers, then there's _NO WAY_ the Democrats can win this election.** **But we only have eight short months to continue chipping away at the Democrats base enough to secure a second term for President Trump.** [That's why I'm counting on you to RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 to keep our highly-successful minority outreach campaign RUNNING STRONG up through Election Day!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=E9TrCsB&) | | [Renew Your Support with a _Monthly_ Donation of $20.20 Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EwZu9AF&)
---
| [Renew Your Support with a _One-Time_ Gift of $ Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWOg&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=Z&z=ECf4F7L&)
---
I don't need to tell you that Stars and Stripes Forever PAC can't stand up to Bloomberg's **$2 BILLION** , but _we don't have to_ because...
...our cost-effective and highly-targeted strategy (_which provided Trump the margin of victory in crucial swing states in 2016_) WILL work again for his re-election.
Thanks to the support of thousands of patriotic Americans like you, Peter, our radio ads have been airing across the country **_since August_** \-- blasting out the TRUTH to carefully selected and key minority markets in crucial swing states and important Congressional races.
We're ON THE AIR right now in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, New Mexico, and Minnesota...
...and we just launched in Michigan, a _critical swing state_ where Trump-endorsed, black conservative, businessman, and veteran **John James** has a _REAL SHOT_ at taking back a U.S. Senate seat from the Democrats.
| | _"He's SPECTACULAR. Rarely have I seen a candidate with such great potential. West Point graduate, successful businessman, and an African American leader...**_He will be a star_**."_

\- President Trump on John James | [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EFs6tFz&)
---|---
[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EVYQZ1&)
Dr. Ben Carson, Vice President Pence, and U.S. Senate candidate John James visiting Dr. Carson's childhood home in Detroit.
[But we MUST do more if we're going to fight back against Bloomberg's BILLIONS and push President Trump to reelection victory.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=ECAJ9co&)
Not only do we need the $16,280/month to keep our current radio ads ON THE AIR...
...but we REALLY need to **DOUBLE DOWN** on the number of spots we're running and expand into other crucial swing states and races across the country.
Peter, you've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners \-- and I pray you'll continue your support all the way up through Election Day.
We really need you, Peter, now more than ever!
[So please RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 with a _monthly_ donation of $20.20 through Election Day (_your monthly donation will automatically end on Nov 3_)...](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWiL&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=z&z=EM4bF7w&)
[...or RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 with an emergency, one-time donation of $20.20 today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEsWOg&mc=9M&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=Z&z=ECTQCqv&)
I pray I will hear back from you shortly.
| _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---
P.S. I hope that you will give my request thoughtful consideration, Peter. **We truly need you on our team, now more than ever!**
Our country can't afford the price we'll pay if Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, or Elizabeth Warren defeats President Trump! We NEED four more years of America First policies that are Making America Great Again.

clean_body: Peter, I really think you must've missed this because... DEADLINE IS TODAY | Dear Peter, You've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners -- and I'm so thankful for your commitment to our critical mission... ...but I noticed you have NOT yet Renewed Your Support for 2020. Our highly-effective minority voter outreach radio ads have been airing in key minority markets in crucial swing states since August \-- and we just launched new ads in Michigan supporting veteran John James for U.S. Senate. Peter, it's absolutely crucial we stayON THE AIR all the way up through Election Day... & | | & | & With Michael Bloomberg dumping $2 BILLION into defeating President Trump this election, we really need you now more than ever, Peter! TODAY IS THE DEADLINE, so I hope to see your response soon. For America, \- John P.S. My original message to you with more details is below... | | | A message from... John Philip Sousa IV National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee Peter, And so it begins... We've officially entered the Primary season with Iowa, New Hampshire, and Nevada behind us -- and it's still anyone's guess who the eventual Democratic nominee will be... ...but you and I don't have to wait to know that the nominee will be a tax-and-spend liberal who wants to return our country back to the Obama days...or worse! & And if that's not bad enough -- now we have a liberal, gun-grabbing, "nanny"-state billionaire to contend with because... Michael Bloomberg has Committed to Spend $2 BILLION to Defeat President Trump this Election! Bloomberg's leaked strategy is to flood the states that Trump won by slim margins in 2016 including Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania... ...which all states where you and I helped Trump win by convincing minorities to vote for the President in unprecedented numbers. In fact... Our minority voter outreach campaign (inspired by Dr. Carson's candidacy) turned out to be CRUCIAL in defeating Hillary Clinton and electing Donald Trump as President & Peter, you've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners \-- and I truly believe that without your help Donald Trump would not have won. You should be proud that you played such a vital role in making President Trump's victory possible because without you... ...we'd be suffocating under Hillary Clinton's iron-fisted regime, the Supreme Court would've shifted far-Left for decades to come, and our beloved nation would've likely never recovered. & It's in that same spirit of saving America from radical leftists that I'm writing to you today, Peter. You see... Our Mission to Reach Out to Minority Voters Didn't End with the Election of Donald Trump In fact, the Left's horrific slide into radical socialism, unveiled hatred for America, scorched-Earth tactics, and vile assault of President Trump has added a new sense of urgency and higher stakes to our mission. That's why we've continued our highly-successful minority outreach and radio advertising campaign to expose the Left's race-baiting lies and convince minorities to abandon the Democratic Party forever... ...a campaign that was inspired by Dr. Ben Carson's presidential and our historic effort to draft him to "Run Ben Run"! began with the first successful Presidential draft effort since Barry Gold Every election, Democrats promise minority voters the moon and the stars in return for their votes. Then, once the election is over, they abandon their promises and turn their backs on the minority voters who secured their victory. And if that doesn't work, Democrats just slander Republicans as racists to SCARE minorities into voting for liberals who DO NOT share their values. & But we're fed up with the Democrats' never-ending lies, ruthless scare-tactics, and race-baiting slander of conservatives... ...and we're fighting back by reaching out to minority voters with the truth that the lying Democrats offer little more than bribes, broken promises, and failed policies that lead to nothing but more of the same: disappointment, lousy schools, poverty, victimization, and anger. & & As you know, hundreds of thousands of patriotic Americans like you made history when we convinced Dr. Ben Carson to run for President in 2016. Together, we became the first successful Presidential draft effort since Barry Goldwater in 1964... ...and we succeeded beyond anyone's wildest expectations in our ability to recruit minority voters to the Republican Party. Since 2013, we have invested millions of dollars on radio, television and print advertisements, billboards, books and issue guides to minority voters exposing the race-baiting lies liberals have been spoon-feeding them about Republicans and our values for decades... And the results have been incredible. Our campaign proven, time and time again , that radio outreach program to Blacks, Asians, Latinos/Hispanics and Women is NOT a "waste of time" as the talking heads and overpaid political consultants have been claiming for years. In fact, recent polling puts Trump's approval ratings at an astonishing 35 percent with Black Voters, 38 percent with Hispanics and 28 percent with Asians. & If President Trump ends up with even HALF of these numbers, then there's NO WAY the Democrats can win this election. But we only have eight short months to continue chipping away at the Democrats base enough to secure a second term for President Trump. & | | & | & I don't need to tell you that Stars and Stripes Forever PAC can't stand up to Bloomberg's $2 BILLION , but we don't have to because... ...our cost-effective and highly-targeted strategy (which provided Trump the margin of victory in crucial swing states in 2016) WILL work again for his re-election. Thanks to the support of thousands of patriotic Americans like you, Peter, our radio ads have been airing across the country since August \-- blasting out the TRUTH to carefully selected and key minority markets in crucial swing states and important Congressional races. We're ON THE AIR right now in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, New Mexico, and Minnesota... ...and we just launched in Michigan, a critical swing state where Trump-endorsed, black conservative, businessman, and veteran John James has a REAL SHOT at taking back a U.S. Senate seat from the Democrats. | | "He's SPECTACULAR. Rarely have I seen a candidate with such great potential. West Point graduate, successful businessman, and an African American leader...He will be a star." \- President Trump on John James | & ---|--- & Dr. Ben Carson, Vice President Pence, and U.S. Senate candidate John James visiting Dr. Carson's childhood home in Detroit. & Not only do we need the $16,280/month to keep our current radio ads ON THE AIR... ...but we REALLY need to DOUBLE DOWN on the number of spots we're running and expand into other crucial swing states and races across the country. Peter, you've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners \-- and I pray you'll continue your support all the way up through Election Day. We really need you, Peter, now more than ever! & & I pray I will hear back from you shortly. | Urgently, John Philip Sousa IV National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC ---|--- P.S. I hope that you will give my request thoughtful consideration, Peter. We truly need you on our team, now more than ever! Our country can't afford the price we'll pay if Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, or Elizabeth Warren defeats President Trump! We NEED four more years of America First policies that are Making America Great Again. & & Thank you for your time, consideration, and of course, your support. | & | & Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. | | Friends,

Today is your last chance to early vote! Find your closest [early voting location on my website](https://votehindman.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c2977729674d0893a093b37e&id=37529028d5&e=52e38a8253), and bring your friends and family to the polls! Our momentum is only growing. I can't thank you enough for the support. If you've already voted, you can help us finish strong in two easy ways.

name: Preston, Team MJ Hegar
subject: Important strategy update for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
With so many candidates on the ballot, it's very likely that we'll go into a runoff election. We don't know who we'll be up against, but we do know two things:

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489051f/7f51f7bc/4d883c1a/4ef19564/812396299/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I want to give you an important strategy update because the primary is next week, and soon this campaign will move into a new phase. As we prepare for that new phase, we'll need all hands on deck -- **[can I count on you to rush a donation now to help elect MJ?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489051f/7f51f7bc/4d883c1a/4ef1955b/812396299/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200228.2nd__986__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

With so many candidates on the ballot, it's very likely that we'll go into a runoff election. We don't know who we'll be up against, but we do know two things:
|
1. **The next three months of a runoff will be a battle.** If we're going to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November, we need to nominate the candidate who can do it. That's why we're working so hard to elect MJ -- a battle-tested fighter who scares the heck out of Sen. Cornyn and his allies.

2. **Sen. Cornyn and shadowy outside groups will try to boost our opponent.** We're almost certain of this because it's part of Sen. Cornyn's playbook, and his ally Mitch McConnell is already doing it in states like North Carolina.

Experts at _Roll Call_ and _The Washington Post_ say that Senator Cornyn is one of the top ten most vulnerable senators, so he and his allies will spend big to boost the opponent they think will be weaker in a general election -- and that won't be MJ. **[We need to be prepared, so I'm asking you to make a matched donation right now >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489051f/7f51f7bc/4d883c1a/4ef1955b/812396299/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200228.2nd__986__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

---

As an important part of this team, I wanted to give you a straightforward look ahead into the next few weeks, but this primary isn't over yet. While there's every indication we're in the lead heading into the primary, we don't put much stock in public polling. **We are not taking this primary for granted.**

Both Tuesday's primary and the runoff election will be true tests for this campaign, and the threat of outside meddling in the near future is serious. **[That's why MJ needs you now and every step along the way. You can make double the impact by making a matched donation right now >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489051f/7f51f7bc/4d883c1a/4ef1955b/812396299/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200228.2nd__986__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We're in this for the long haul, Peter, and I'm glad you're with us.

Preston Elliott
Campaign Manager

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489051f/7f51f7bc/4d883c1a/4ef1955b/812396299/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200228.2nd__986__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

As we prepare for that new phase, we'll need all hands on deck -- "" With so many candidates on the ballot, it's very likely that we'll go into a runoff election. We don't know who we'll be up against, but we do know two things: | 1. The next three months of a runoff will be a battle. If we're going to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November, we need to nominate the candidate who can do it. That's why we're working so hard to elect MJ -- a battle-tested fighter who scares the heck out of Sen. Cornyn and his allies. 2. Sen. Cornyn and shadowy outside groups will try to boost our opponent. We're almost certain of this because it's part of Sen. Cornyn's playbook, and his ally Mitch McConnell is already doing it in states like North Carolina. Experts at Roll Call and The Washington Post say that Senator Cornyn is one of the top ten most vulnerable senators, so he and his allies will spend big to boost the opponent they think will be weaker in a general election -- and that won't be MJ. "" As an important part of this team, I wanted to give you a straightforward look ahead into the next few weeks, but this primary isn't over yet. While there's every indication we're in the lead heading into the primary, we don't put much stock in public polling. We are not taking this primary for granted. Both Tuesday's primary and the runoff election will be true tests for this campaign, and the threat of outside meddling in the near future is serious. "" We're in this for the long haul, Peter, and I'm glad you're with us. Preston Elliott Campaign Manager "" | MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Where's Wagle?
body:
Silenced by Scandal?

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/wheres-wagle?e=41f8e27552)
Dear Friend,

Susan Wagle as president of the Kansas Senate should be a key leader in our state’s preparedness effort to confront the coronavirus. Yet, since the crisis unfolded nearly a month ago, Wagle has been silent.

Wagle has been underground since yet another scandal hit her U.S. Senate bid and facing fallout from headlines like the one recently appearing in the Iola Register:

“Sen. Susan Wagle says it’s an ‘excellent time’ to leave Kansas”

Big issues come before the U.S. Senate every day affecting our nation’s health, security and economy. We cannot afford to send a “silent senator” preoccupied with politics to Washington.

I’m the only businessman in this race. I’ve balanced budgets, employed hundreds of Kansans, navigated recessions, skipped my own paycheck to ensure my employees and their families were secure, and served in my community. I made it all work by keeping focus on matters bigger than myself.

Leadership is the difference separating the candidates on the Republican ballot in August. We cannot be silent. Every leader relies on a strong team. I need your help today to keep our momentum going.

A contribution of any amount - $250, $100, $75, $50, or $25 – will have an immediate impact to advance our campaign. Don’t be silent – you can be the difference on Election Day. Your contribution today of even $10 will allow us to reach nearly 40 voters in the mail and hundreds through social media.

DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=4866ed5401-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_28_07_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-4866ed5401-180644441)

VIEW DAVE'S PRIORITIES (https://lindstromforsenate.com/daves-priorities/?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=4866ed5401-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_28_07_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-4866ed5401-180644441)

Thank you again for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!

Dave

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Meet Betsie and Jon
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

I met with Betsie and Jon today to thank them for their past support of
our campaigns and to tell them about Powered by People.

Betsie is a top-rated seller on Ebay and she and Jon also customize Chuck
Taylor shoes. Ademas, Jon has been known to DJ.

She told me she likes what we’re doing and is on board when it comes to
our plan to bring thousands of volunteer canvassers together to help win
critical state house races in Texas.

But what was really exciting to her was the social dynamic of our effort.
The fact that Powered by People builds community among the volunteers who
sign up in these races. We talked about how, when we sit down to share a
meal and a beer after a long day of knocking on doors, we develop
camaraderie among the canvassers that persists long after the campaign
concludes. This is hard work, but it’s also fun.

It’s the antidote to the despair and isolation that so many of us feel in
the age of Trump. It gives us connection and purpose and encourages us to
answer the call when we’re asked to volunteer in the next race.

At the end of our conversation we took a picture together and said our
goodbyes. This evening I learned that Betsie later went online
to [ http://act.betoorourke.com/go/42393?t=1001&akid=80529%2E444211%2EPjoNs7 ]poweredxpeople.org and made a very generous contribution.

Thanks to supporters like Betsie and Jon, we are able to bring the power
of people to bear at this important moment in our country’s life.

We are grateful to them, to you, and everyone who makes this possible.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42394?refcode=ema20200228-80529&t=1002&akid=80529%2E444211%2EPjoNs7 ]Donate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=80529%2E444211%2EPjoNs7

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Says Coronavirus Response is Working, Taps Pence to Lead Fight
body:
"President Trump told Americans not to panic over the coronavirus Wednesday, saying he’s taken the reins." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=02bf562f5e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Trump Says Coronavirus Response is Working, Taps Pence to Lead Fight**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74b8d84d4c&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
“President Trump told Americans not to panic over the coronavirus Wednesday, saying he’s taken the reins, U.S. patients are recovering, and his decision to defy critics and restrict travel from China is working,” Tom Howell Jr. reports. “Because of all we’ve done, the risk to the American people remains very low,” the President said.

**🎬** **Vice President Pence:** [President’s message is clear: We’re ready.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=09ab572b5f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump's India Statecraft is Forward-Thinking and Necessary**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb6ea2f176&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“Addressing more than 100,000 people in a packed Ahmedabad stadium [in India this week], Trump offered a bright vision of future friendship between the world's most powerful and its most populous democracies.”

**🇮🇳** **Watch:** [President and First Lady visit the historic Taj Mahal!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9dcb8ce86&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Meets With Black Supporters, Vows Equal Opportunity**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c66868494c&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Associated Press_
During a reception Thursday honoring African American History Month, President Trump “cited low unemployment rates for African Americans and passage of a criminal justice bill providing earlier release for thousands of federal drug offenders” as strides made under the Trump Administration to deliver equal opportunity for all Americans.
---
|
---
| [**Trump’s Court Win Denying Sanctuary Cities Grants is Major Blow to Liberal Extremists**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=64e9493dee&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“On Wednesday, the 2nd Circuit Court of Appeals in New York overturned a lower court decision and ruled that the Department of Justice can indeed withhold grant money from local and state governments that purposely flout the law and put American lives at risk,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes.

**MORE:** [“Immigrants who seek opportunity should comply with longstanding American values”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ecc2e630e5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**During India Trip, Melania Trump Visits 'Happiness' Class at School**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0af151391&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Associated Press_
“U.S. first lady Melania Trump on Tuesday visited a ‘happiness class’ at a government-run school in the Indian capital. The curriculum dovetails with her ‘Be Best’ initiative to teach children and young adults to be kind, avoid drugs and take care of themselves,” _The Associated Press_ reports.

** First Lady:** [Meeting students at Sarvodaya School was “unforgettable”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=044e0f1e5c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

name: Team Scheller
subject: Grassroots Update: Petition Period Edition
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I just wanted to take a minute out of your day to give you a quick update on what Team Scheller has been up to over the past few weeks. We just wrappe **Grassroots Update: Petition Period Edition** Team - I just wanted to take a minute out of your day to give you a quick update on what Team Scheller has been up to over the past few weeks. We just wrapped up petition period here in the Lehigh Valley!
What is petition period? Well we needed to get ONE THOUSAND signatures of registered Republicans from right here in Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District in order to qualify for the primary ballot on April 28th with only three weeks to get it done.
I am pleased to inform you that not only did Team Scheller surpass 1,000 signatures, our team was able to gather OVER DOUBLE the amount needed and collected signatures in all three counties of the 7th district. That's right, we obtained over 2,000 signatures from right here in the 7th district.

Just as a quick breakdown of what it took for us to double the goal of signatures needed to get on the ballot. | |
---

✅Over 2,000 signatures collected

✅All three counties

✅53 volunteers

✅5,000 doors knocked

✅Hosted eight meet-and-greets

|
---
We had 53 volunteers who put in hard, cold, long hours going door-to-door getting their neighbors and friends to sign for Lisa. We knocked on over 5,000 doors within the 7th congressional district talking to voters about why Lisa is the conservative leader we need to take on Susan Wild.

Team Sheller also held eight meet-and-greet events all across the district. We attended gun shows, car auctions, fairs, hunting expos, and many other events. Needless to say Team Scheller was out in FULL FORCE during petition period. As we move forward into the primary I can’t wait to keep you in the loop as to how our grassroots army continues to grow. I hope you can join us on our journey.

Onward to victory,

Alex Meyer
Campaign Manager

name: Laura Loomer
subject: It’s heating up . . .
body:
Hi, it’s Laura. I’m attending CPAC, near Washington D.C. right now and am taking a quick break from the crowds to send you this quick email.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-366136-858462-4888241-969be490fb-4441aa9409)
Patriot,

Hi, it’s Laura.

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-366136-858462-4888242-6aee8fec01-4441aa9409) I’m attending CPAC, near Washington D.C. right now and I am taking a quick break from the crowds to send you this quick email.

First, we have just over one day to close out our February fundraising! We’re $8k away from hitting our February goal.

[**Can you pitch in today! Any amount helps!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-366136-858462-4888241-969be490fb-4441aa9409)

The media is starting to focus on our race for President Trump’s Congressional District and the word is that heavy-hitting Democrat fundraisers are ramping up so that my opponent, Lazy Lois Frankel can outraise us this quarter.

[**DON’T GIVE THEM THE SATISFACTION! DONATE TODAY!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-366136-858462-4888241-969be490fb-4441aa9409)
Here’s a clip from an article that appeared today:

> _President Trump has tweeted supportively of her race, his presidential campaign is renting out her email list, and Trump’s 2016 Florida Director Karen Giorno is managing her campaign. Republican Rep. Jim Jordan appears to have rented out her list, too. And Loomer claims endorsements from high-profile personalities and friends of Trump including Roger Stone, Jeanine Pirro, Bo Snerdly, and Michelle Malkin . . .**you have what appears to be a well-connected, establishment campaign designed for a rising party star**._
**I NEVER expected in my wildest dreams to be called “establishment” but I’ll take it if that’s what they think I need to win!**

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-366136-858462-4888241-969be490fb-4441aa9409)
But the updates get better!

Martin S. Bermudez, the Florida Representative for the LEXIT movement (Latino Exit from the Democrat Party) sent over the following endorsement this week:

> _The LEXIT Movement is proud to endorse Laura Loomer for Congress for Florida’s 21st Congressional District! Laura, 26, is a Jewish Conservative investigative journalist and activist. Laura is and always has been a loyal supporter of President Donald J. Trump. As a Congresswoman, Laura will continue to fight for free speech and First Amendment rights for all Americans! Please join us and VOTE for Laura Loomer for Congress!_
Amazing right!

We’re on track to win this, [**so please help me hit our fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-366136-858462-4888241-969be490fb-4441aa9409)

We’re just $8k away from the goal and if you pitch in ANY amount, it gets us one step closer to taking Washington!

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-366136-858462-4888241-969be490fb-4441aa9409)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-366136-858462-84585d41bbe610b-4441aa9409)

subject: This is why we're rejecting corporate PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
OK, team -- This past week, our travels have taken us from the Missouri to the Mississippi, from Woodbury to Muscatine, and we hear one thing over and over again: Iowans don't want Wash
|

| | OK, team -- This past week, our travels have taken us from the Missouri to the Mississippi, from Woodbury to Muscatine, and we hear one thing over and over again: Iowans don't want Washington election interference, and they don't want PAC money in our primary. Taking PAC money means when a corporation calls, they expect their politician to answer. When they call Mike, they get shut out. Our campaign has its priorities straight, so Mike is in tune with your needs. This way, he'll provide the best for our state -- not lobbyists. **But that 's why we ask for your help so often. At this moment we're in the middle of our end-of-month fundraising drive, and we're asking you to help us raise another $22,398 before midnight on Saturday.** [_**Can you pitch in $10, $15 or whatever you can spare to bring us closer to our goal?**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24f6/33365068/4a6c041a/3f8be72f/2930217666/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_eom_02?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200228_eom1_em_fr_all_L1") | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24f6/33365068/4a6c041a/3f8be728/2930217666/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_eom_02?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200228_eom1_em_fr_all_btn1")

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: end of month deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
A lot has happened this month as we inch ever closer to Election Day. Peter A lot has happened this month as we inch ever closer to Election Day.

* Bernie is gaining strength toward the Democrat nomination.

* Polls are showing tightening races across the country.

* **My opponent, Susan Wild, is getting endorsed by the most radical leftist groups in the country. **

What’s becoming increasingly clear is that we’re confronting an important national decision:
** Is America a country of CAPITALISM or SOCIALISM?**
**Is America a country of DEMOCRACY or COMMUNISM?**
As we near our end of month deadline we need to make sure we are ending this month with a strong stance against the forces our country has been fighting for generations.
**[Can I count on you to chip in towards that goal now?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=937b5053894243368066704f959cca5b&_e=G6_Pl7z4e7SOVQWoqdSN7gtE5T3eZqoj6Nw8I-3ThdoSMPr9ETOE-tyL2kV0jmH8ChHfOe_tb62ExaWVPgYK6ZF8sWNfVGKKVfEMy_DKfBpKzVjNSXkhSvNepdZFYLGl4ChcU7w-TswUWDyzkxlaFf-PleeXk2GvMKNvWB8ETx5LeumFV8p0EzYAm9AK3aUzDnIis45o_PGKOhuMRlbQBh91plKYPrhzhEi8B9A_GBwrDx1c0KOOCb_q4ASGiR8XJqd_oadO1weRGUMgxCfXNtf7disNlZrC6PKACt3H4ByNTtqb6L9pgBNKz1S9JQ9a5k2Yi8_cxMTTTLz-fzL-Y5Pb0p44GhSfvl2Sk4i_P7nUBB0vMCiQUQN6b-rMKQEL74pCegc_8k7N5BgHreqVvGFPKS64EkrDsP1eCiFyJ7jRilzNAJkTrkNTazf--yZt)** [ **CHIP IN: HIT OUR END OF MONTH GOAL** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=937b5053894243368066704f959cca5b&_e=G6_Pl7z4e7SOVQWoqdSN7gtE5T3eZqoj6Nw8I-3ThdoSMPr9ETOE-tyL2kV0jmH8ChHfOe_tb62ExaWVPgYK6ZF8sWNfVGKKVfEMy_DKfBpKzVjNSXkhSvNepdZFYLGl4ChcU7w-TswUWDyzkxlaFf-PleeXk2GvMKNvWB8ETx5LeumFV8p0EzYAm9AK3aUzDnIis45o_PGKOhuMRlbQBu_TkccUJkLQX4jn5NIAAyBQBlJxF-G8vsplbl3jTaC7zF3rO6EpSNQ_mM29ckOMxYVolBU5lDpFl88aFW07hqDMmgMNSQiVvRHoMXel7YnqvNElW7CZecgLU6Tckq8wZfu7nq0rHg2MecJ_YW6avwzQGZdy289YcfhRjH1S1aph2ifMG1hkKTl3QumnEfNlOICxEU90A-1hUhZM5mJ96nSnlPqUTzQn0yzQDpNOLX-w) [ **WE ARE NOT SOCIALISTS** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=937b5053894243368066704f959cca5b&_e=G6_Pl7z4e7SOVQWoqdSN7gtE5T3eZqoj6Nw8I-3ThdoSMPr9ETOE-tyL2kV0jmH8ChHfOe_tb62ExaWVPgYK6ZF8sWNfVGKKVfEMy_DKfBpKzVjNSXkhSvNepdZFYLGl4ChcU7w-TswUWDyzkxlaFf-PleeXk2GvMKNvWB8ETx5LeumFV8p0EzYAm9AK3aUzDnIis45o_PGKOhuMRlbQBtd1XbWs9MMQVNSDQavdv5PrfyjkmCvpmS4yCKbTMwB_gTQC_8K4jXLHkHZf-iz83G2E0CwMnbOxC4itC9XLm5AbzLTswPf_VoekTTag-qFzETDMqwQNN8dMx70RwnpmFHsPswttHIAWMOo0t5nqzLhfOCi1VKdlhdCQKvHg2ip3UIVuLV3osaieg8ozn-si_OC9NwFjLKV67rhSr4xscPts9gtmeVqxZI796plBCWvO) Peter, this month we have an opportunity to issue a stern, loud, and ABSOLUTE REJECTION of the dangerous ideology of socialism.

clean_body: A lot has happened this month as we inch ever closer to Election Day. Peter A lot has happened this month as we inch ever closer to Election Day. Bernie is gaining strength toward the Democrat nomination. Polls are showing tightening races across the country. My opponent, Susan Wild, is getting endorsed by the most radical leftist groups in the country. What’s becoming increasingly clear is that we’re confronting an important national decision: Is America a country of CAPITALISM or SOCIALISM? Is America a country of DEMOCRACY or COMMUNISM? As we near our end of month deadline we need to make sure we are ending this month with a strong stance against the forces our country has been fighting for generations. Peter, this month we have an opportunity to issue a stern, loud, and ABSOLUTE REJECTION of the dangerous ideology of socialism. If we report strong numbers this month, Democrats will notice that we are FIRED UP and READY to defeat the dangerous ideas they are warming up to. NOW is our chance to show exactly how we feel about Sanders and his radical agenda... and if we can beat our End of Month goal in the process, that’s two birds with one stone. ** Lisa Scheller Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.

| | You won’t believe this! I just got word that our opponent received an individual donation from just _**6 KENTUCKIANS**_ in 2019. Can you help us show him our hometown support? <<[YES, I’M IN](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=26a75cf3f0&e=5ac6ff05c3)>>

Sadly, our opponent has been more focused on collecting out-of-state cash than earning the support of our friends and neighbors. Perhaps that explains why he blocked President Trump’s attempt to repeal Obamacare or why he’s failed to prioritize constituent services in the way Geoff Davis and Jim Bunning did. Simply put, he doesn’t support Kentucky - and Kentucky isn’t supporting him.

So, here’s what we’re doing about it. I’m trying to get 24 people to [donate just $6](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=983eeef523&e=5ac6ff05c3) during the last two days of February. name: John Delaney
subject: Do you stay or do you go?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of John Delaney
body:
| Friends,

[I have an op-ed in today's _Washington Post_](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b93a3c/30fd46cd/32297bb0/2357c844/44367966/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2020/02/28/john-delaney-when-to-quit-oped/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+I+have+an+oped+in+todays+Washington+Post&utm_campaign=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all&source=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all"). I share the thought process that led me to withdraw from the race last month and ask the remaining candidates running for our party's nomination to take a hard look at their candidacies and ask themselves:
> _Will they continue to make a positive difference, or will they steer the race toward a candidate who either can 't win or can't govern and, in so doing, undermine everything they care about?_
I hope you'll take a few minutes to read it and share it with your friends and family. All the best,
John Delaney
* * *
## John Delaney: It's not easy to end a presidential campaign. But sometimes it has to be done.
Do you stay or do you go?

I suspect several presidential candidates are wrestling with that gut-wrenching question right now. I do not envy them.

I certainly know what it feels like. You have been campaigning tirelessly for more than a year. (In my case, it was 2 1/2.) You know in your heart that you have the right message, the best ideas and the skills to lead the country. But the results of the early primaries and caucuses (or, in my case, the early polls) are getting hard to ignore. They suggest that you have no path to the nomination.

It is difficult to let it all go. You have invested enormous amounts of time. You are blessed with extraordinary supporters and amazing volunteers. You think about the thousands of patriotic Americans you met. People who love their country, their neighbors and their families and who care deeply about the character of this nation. You ask yourself: Are you letting them down?

You tell yourself that leaving the race -- "quitting" -- is not what you are made of. This kind of endeavor does not attract quitters.

You think the playing field will suddenly shift and everyone will start coming your way. But life, like politics, rarely works like that.

Everyone who enters the race for president has something to offer. But only one person can win the nomination -- the person who best answers the central question that voters are asking at that moment. And sometimes, even your best stuff is not good enough.

Although for a while I did [more events](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b93a3c/30fd46cd/32297bb0/2357c847/44367966/VEsE/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://fivethirtyeight.com/features/the-candidates-who-are-going-all-in-on-iowa-or-new-hampshire/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=2+-+more+events&utm_campaign=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all&source=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all") across our nation than any other candidate (I had been running longer than most, after all), I still could not break in to the top tier. And though I hated to admit it, voters were not responding sufficiently. Yes, many were, but not enough. For most of the campaign, I was not deterred because we were changing the debate, and my solutions -- on health care, education, trade and climate -- were the right answers for this country.

As we got closer to the Iowa caucuses, however, my lens changed. It was hard to stay undeterred. It was clear to me that my support was not enough to meet the 15 percent viability threshold in a material number of precincts, and that because the field was still so crowded, it might have caused other moderate candidates to not make that viability threshold.

I strongly believe that the Democratic Party should advance a candidate who is committed to governing with fact-based, bipartisan solutions. This approach -- which flipped the House in 2018 -- will defeat President Trump, unify our nation and get things done. I did not want the good work of my campaign to make it harder for those like-minded candidates on the bubble of viability to advance. If I had stayed in the race longer, which I could have, my efforts might have undermined the very reason I ran.

It was a difficult decision, but [I left the race](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b93a3c/30fd46cd/32297bb0/2357c846/44367966/VEsF/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/john-delaney-says-hes-dropping-out-of-presidential-race/2020/01/31/69187b22-41fe-11ea-b5fc-eefa848cde99_story.html?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=3+-+I+left+the+race&utm_campaign=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all&source=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all") three days before the Iowa caucuses and have no regrets.

Now, other candidates have a similar choice.

Let me offer them a way to think about how to bring the curtain down. Reflect on what originally called you to public service. Just before I first ran for Congress, I wrestled with the impact it would have on my life and my family. I was 20 years into a successful business career, the chief executive of a public company I founded, and had control over my life. My wife, April, told me I was focusing on the wrong things. Quoting Rick Warren, the author of "The Purpose Driven Life," April said, "It's not about you" -- it's about the difference you can make in the lives of other people.

As other candidates consider this decision, I urge them to remember why they were called to public service in the first place: to make a difference. And they have. They have contributed to the debate and made a disproportionate difference. Leaving is not a defeat. It is a triumph.

But if they stay in, they must ask themselves: Will they continue to make a positive difference, or will they steer the race toward a candidate who either can't win or can't govern and, in so doing, undermine everything they care about?

Only the remaining candidates themselves know what course is best. Many who have exited in recent months have done so with their high character intact, including Sens. Michael F. Bennet of Colorado, Cory Booker of New Jersey and Kamala D. Harris of California, and Montana Gov. Steve Bullock and former Massachusetts governor Deval Patrick.

And if we, the Democratic Party, want to give ourselves the best chance of beating Trump, I urge some candidates to exit so they don't continue to fracture the vote, work against each other and prevent a pragmatic candidate from being our nominee. It's not about you.

---
| | Paid for by Friends of John Delaney
---
PO Box 70835, Bethesda, MD 20813
This email was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b93a3c/30fd46cd/32297bb0/2357c841/44367966/VEsC/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://go.johndelaney.com/page/s/update-your-information?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=4+-+EMAIL&utm_campaign=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all&source=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all"). If you were forwarded this email or would like to update your contact information, [click here](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b93a3c/30fd46cd/32297bb0/2357c840/44367966/VEsD/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://go.johndelaney.com/page/s/update-your-information?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=5+-+click+here&utm_campaign=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all&source=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all"). To unsubscribe completely, [click here](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b93a3c/30fd46cd/32297bb0/2357c843/44367966/VEsA/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://go.johndelaney.com/page/content/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all&source=em_news_2020.02.28_e1_jkd_wapo_all").

subject: unfortunately:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | My closest Democratic colleagues all asked for your help: \- Nancy Pelosi \- Adam Schiff \- Kirsten Gillibrand \- James Carville \- Paul Begala \- Deb Haaland \- Gabby Giffords \- Tom Udall \- Martin Heinrich [**_After my closest colleagues -- and President Obama himself -- called you to action to flip the Senate, I thought I would see a surge of support before tomorrow 's critical end-of-month deadline. Unfortunately, that's not what happened.
